zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet ferch Owain於1300年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Owain " Pedi" ap Ifor31歲，母親Miss. Gronwy31歲。她和John ap Ieaun of Merthyr至少有3個兒子。她去世於大約1425年在她的家鄉享年126歲，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet ferch Owain was born in 1300, in Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Owain " Pedi" ap Ifor, was 31 and her mother, Miss. Gronwy, was 31. She had at least 3 sons with John ap Ieaun of Merthyr. She died about 1425, in her hometown, at the age of 126, and was buried in Glamorgan, Wales.

Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec John ap Ieaun of Merthyr. Elle est décédée environ 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 126 ans, et a été enterrée à Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonet ferch Owainが1300年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Owain " Pedi" ap Iforは31歳，母Miss. Gronwyは31歳であった。彼女はJohn ap Ieaun of Merthyrとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1425年に故郷で126歳で死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet ferch Owain(이)가 1300년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain " Pedi" ap Ifor(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Miss. Gronwy(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 John ap Ieaun of Merthyr(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1425년 그녀의 고향에서 126세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet ferch Owain родилась в 1300 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Owain " Pedi" ap Ifor было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Miss. Gronwy, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от John ap Ieaun of Merthyr. Она умерла около 1425 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 126 лет и была похоронена в местности глэморган, Уэльс.
